issues_found: Black/empty frames at source start (0.0-1.5s) and tail (101.0-101.78s)
Sustained dead-air silence around 49.0-51.0s (RMS below -180 dB for ~1.5s)
Pre-roll title/intro graphics 0-4s not part of the tutorial body
Speech loudness uneven across the clip (varied from -45 dB to -22 dB RMS)

segments.label: tutorial_part_1
segments.reason: Tutorial body after intro graphics; includes clap demonstration and explanation of why creators clap before takes.

segments.label: tutorial_part_2

removed_damage_ranges.reason: Black frames followed by branded title sequence; not tutorial content.

removed_damage_ranges.label: dead_air_silence

removed_damage_ranges.label: tail_black
removed_damage_ranges.reason: Trailing black/empty frames after content ends.

audio_filters.name: loudnorm
audio_filters.reason: Normalize speech loudness to -16 LUFS with -1.5 dBTP ceiling; prevents clipping without muting or replacing original audio.

operations.reason: Join the two kept segments in order
